evidence_summary: Establish the transition of power for the_scarecrow through a formal ceremonial hand-off at the emerald_city_outskirts. The scene must visually resolve the Emerald City arc by transitioning from the rigid formality of the guardian's gate to the liberated mo...
The group says their goodbyes at the gates of the Emerald City. The Guardian returns the green spectacles to the group and formally acknowledges the Scarecrow's new role as a ruler.
The group stands in a formal cluster facing the guardian_of_the_gate at the gate threshold.
The group turns away from the gate, moving toward the forest/fields in a liberated manner.
The formal return of the green spectacles and the recognition of the_scarecrow's sovereignty.
